items.title: Dwine 0.1.0 is here
items.body: The first public build: every Minecraft version, four mod loaders, six themes, the drag-and-drop HUD editor, and the safety policy engine that keeps everything 100% legit.

items.title: One-click performance
items.body: The FPS preset installs Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, Entity Culling, ModernFix and friends — resolved against your exact Minecraft version, with graceful skips where a mod is already built into the game.

items.title: Your theme, inside the game
items.body: Dwine renders your launcher theme into a resource pack on every launch: buttons, hotbar, menu backgrounds and your custom crosshair — server-legal everywhere, no code injection.
